title: Crime defined
doc_html:
SUBPART B.  ELEMENTS OF CRIMES

§7.  Crime defined

A crime is that conduct which is defined as criminal in this Code, or in other acts of the legislature, or in the constitution of this state.

§7.  Crime defined
